sections.name: workflow: epic
lines: PLANNED (todo): allowed from PLANNED: ACTIVE (or `--force` to override)
ACTIVE (doing): allowed from ACTIVE: DONE (or `--force` to override)
DONE (done): no transitions out of DONE; use `--force` to override

sections.name: workflow: ticket
lines: TODO (todo): allowed from TODO: IN_PROGRESS, WONT_DO (or `--force` to override)
IN_PROGRESS (doing), wip 3/warn: allowed from IN_PROGRESS: REVIEW, TODO, WONT_DO (or `--force` to override)
REVIEW (doing), wip 2/warn: allowed from REVIEW: DONE, IN_PROGRESS (or `--force` to override)
DONE (done): no transitions out of DONE; use `--force` to override
WONT_DO (done), resolution=dropped: no transitions out of WONT_DO; use `--force` to override

sections.name: commit
lines: subject: "kira: update {count} items" (up to 5 ticket numbers listed, then a count)
link marker: trailer — a "Kira-Ticket" git trailer naming the ticket
link marker: subject — a `[KEY-n]` marker in the commit subject
link marker: leading_number — a bare KEY-n token leading the subject
reference marker: bare — a KEY-n token anywhere in the commit body

sections.name: vocab
lines: system label: captured (auto-added by `kira create --here`; excluded from vocabulary checks)
resolutions_dropped: dropped (a done-category resolution treated as a non-completion outcome for epic progress)

sections.name: ui
lines: icons: auto (override with the KIRA_ICONS env var: nerd|emoji|text|always|never)
